name: CORONARY ARTERY FISTULA
definition: direct precapillary connection between branch of coronary a. + lumen of heart chamber /

demographics.Prevalence: 0.05-0.25% of coronary angiographies; 0.002% of general population

dominant_finding: may have normal CXR (in small shunts)
discriminating_features: may have normal CXR (in small shunts)
dilated tortuous coronary artery with anomalous connection
single (most) / multiple communications / network of fine vessels

general: may have normal CXR (in small shunts)
ANGIO: dilated tortuous coronary artery with anomalous connection
single (most) / multiple communications / network of fine vessels

clinical.Cx: myocardial ischemia / sudden cardiac death (in large shunt), CHF, endocarditis,
